title: SQL Injection and XSS Attack Detection
description: Detects SQL injection and cross-site scripting attacks against CRM and Drone Shop applications. Captures attack payload, source IP, target endpoint, and APM trace for full forensic analysis.
query: 'Log Source' = 'SOC Application Logs' and 'Attack Type' in ('sqli', 'xss_reflected', 'xss_stored', 'xss_dom') | stats count as Attacks by 'Attack Type', 'Risk Level', 'Service Name', 'Client IP' | sort -Attacks
